plan.stop_when: Physical-layer fault indicators confirmed OR confidence ≥ 0.85

correlator_llm_output.rca: CPU utilization exceeded 85% threshold due to ongoing backup job and interface queue overflow, causing system instability.
remedy: Check backup job scheduling to prevent resource contention
Monitor interface queue sizes to prevent full interfaces
Implement automatic cleanup of interface traffic
Review and adjust CPU resource allocation policies
correlator_llm_output.explanation: The combination of high CPU utilization from the backup job and interface queue overflow directly correlates with the CPU threshold crossing, indicating potential system instability.
